system.description:
You have delved into secrets of the bounty available in many natural environments. To perform this journey activity, the party cannot be in a populated area such as a Country Shire, Open Roads, or Urban Township. Before rolling to obtain a medicinal using your @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-adventuring-gear.Item.3muu012tsfb455sa]{Herbalism Kit}, you may instead choose to locate an obscure medicinal (also a DC 16). On a check result of 23+ you locate 2 of the same obscure medicinal. All normal bonuses to your herbalism kit check apply, but if you choose to locate obscure rather than common medicinals you will not benefit from gathering twice as many doses due to your @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.g4zq453nbnhm80eo]{Herbal Apothecary} knack (Secrets of Nature).

If your check is successful, roll on the Obscure Medicinals table to determine what was found.

@Embed[Compendium.a5e.a5e-roll-tables.RollTable.fmpcdAcvALcu2u2P caption=false cite=true rollable=true]
